About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education Department is responsible for the development of basic education in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

The department aims to provide quality education to all students in the state.

About the Programme

The UP Lalitpur ECCE Educator Recruitment 2026 is an outsourcing opportunity for graduates to work as ECCE educators in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

The programme aims to provide quality education to young children in the state.
